combat.baseHitChance.desc: Base percent chance an attack lands, before attacker accuracy and defender avoidance.

combat.critMultiplier.desc: Damage multiplier applied on a critical hit.

combat.markBonusMultiplier.desc: Damage multiplier against a hunter's-marked target (mark_of_the_hunter).

combat.darkMissPenalty.desc: Initial to-hit penalty (percentage points) when attacking a target you can't see in the dark.

combat.darkAdaptationPerRound.desc: Percentage points the dark to-hit penalty eases each combat round as eyes adjust.

combat.darkAdaptationCap.desc: Maximum the dark to-hit penalty can ease over a single fight.

proficiency.ceiling.desc: Maximum effective success chance; even 100 proficiency fails a tiny fraction of the time.

proficiency.baseGain.desc: Proficiency gained per attempt at 0; tapers toward the ceiling as proficiency rises.

proficiency.minGain.desc: Minimum proficiency gain per attempt, so the climb to 100 never fully stalls.

leveling.xpPerLevel.desc: XP-to-advance coefficient: cost to reach the next level = value * current level.

regen.manaBase.desc: Mana restored per status tick while standing and out of combat.

regen.healthBase.desc: Health restored per status tick while standing and out of combat.

regen.sittingMultiplier.desc: Regen multiplier while sitting (out of combat).

regen.restingMultiplier.desc: Regen multiplier while resting (out of combat).

regen.arcaneMeditationMultiplier.desc: Mana-regen multiplier from arcane_meditation while sitting or resting.

regen.wildernessLoreBonus.desc: Extra regen factor from wilderness_lore while resting/sitting outdoors.

passive.parryProficiencyFactor.desc: Parry avoidance% = parry proficiency * this factor.
